creator: muir@idiom.com
text:
Typing make in /usr/ports/lang/perl didn't build a new perl.

	Why?  'cuase there was a work directory for the old version 
	hanging about.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Find a port that's changed.  Build the old version.  Update the
	port.  Try building the new version w/o first doing a make clean.
